productDisplayName: Murcia Women Lambretta Green Black Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black and green shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or even college. The bag is large enough to accommodate your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long.Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleOne roomy zippered compartment with one inner zippered compartmentTwo green handles with buckles for ease of carrying, extra comfort and styleMetal loops to hold handles for added style and durabilityBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and durabilityMetallic legs at the bottom to make the bag stand straight when set downBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
